titles.title: How Good Is the God We Adore!

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: How good is the God we adore, Our faithful, unchangeable Friend, Whose love is as great as His power, And knows neither measure nor end

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Tis Jesus the First and the Last, Whose Spirit shall guide us safe home; We’ll praise Him for all that is past, And trust Him for all that’s to come.
